mapper.insert:
insert into sys_common_detail ( sys_id, link_sys_id, common_cd, common_nm, ord_no, use_yn, delete_yn, insert_datetime, insert_user_id, modify_datetime, modify_user_id, sys_plant_cd ) values
( #{item.sysId}, #{item.linkSysId}, #{item.commonCd}, #{item.commonNm}, #{item.ordNo}, #{item.useYn}, 'N', now(), #{userId}, null, null, null )
mapper.delete:
update sys_common_detail set delete_yn = 'Y', modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id in
#{id}

update.foreach: update sys_common_detail set common_nm = #{item.commonNm}, ord_no = #{item.ordNo}, modify_datetime = now(), modify_user_id = #{userId} where 1=1 and sys_id = #{item.sysId}

mapper.select:
select scd.sys_id, scd.link_sys_id, scm.common_cd as master_common_cd, scd.common_cd, scd.common_nm, scd.use_yn from sys_common_detail scd left join sys_common_master scm on scm.sys_id = scd.link_sys_id where 1=1 and scd.sys_id in
#{item.sysId}
